---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement for Project Black Monolith
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

**Module**
Which module would this affect? (MCP-Shield / VectorAnchor / TraceAudit /
Dashboard / cross-cutting)

**Problem / motivation**
What problem does this solve? What attack or gap does it address? (Keep it
defensive — this project detects and blocks attacks, it does not build them.)

**Proposed solution**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

**Alternatives considered**
Any alternative approaches you thought about.

**Additional context**
Anything else — links, references to the threat class, etc.
